creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to dewayne from comment #0)

> /dev/ada0s1b.eli none swap sw 0 0

From <https://man.freebsd.org/cgi/man.cgi?query=fstab&sektion=5&manpath=freebsd-release>: 

> … To delay swapon for a device until after savecore has copied the 
> crash dump to another location, use the “late” option. …
